The [[1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS]] (NG IBO) '''ASW-G-01 Gundam Bael''' is a 1/100 scale kit released in 2017.

==Includes==
''Italicized lines are from the First Run of the kit.''
*Gundam Bael
**x2 Bael Swords
**Manipulators (1 pair for each)
***Open-palm
***Weapon-holding
****Regular
****w/ Hinge joint
*''Action Base 1 (Pearl White)''
**''Gjallarhorn Insignia sticker decals''
==Kit Features & Gimmicks==

=== Articulation ===
*The head can swivel on a ball-and-socket neck joint.
*The torso can tilt forwards, or sideways (with functioning pistons).
*The arms can...
**Swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
**Raise horizontally.
*The upper arms can rotate.
*Elbow joints can be bent up to 120 degrees.
*The manipulators can swivel on a ball-and-socket joint.
*The waist can rotate, though it can be partially hindered by parts of the skirt armor.
* The hip joint axis can swing frontward/backwards on one side.
* The upper thigh joints can swing frontwards (and backwards in some extent) on a peg-and-socket joint, raise horizontally, and/or rotate on each piece.
**Front and side skirt armors can lift up to provide clearance.
*The knees are double-jointed.
*Ankle joints can pivot and/or slightly tilt.
=== Weapons/Other Gimmicks ===
*The armor can attach onto, or removed from the Gundam Frame. (Some parts required swapping.)
*The hands are swappable.
*The Bael Sword can be optionally attach onto/detach from the rear blade holder as Bael's handheld weapon/s.
**The Sword can be wielded by either the regular or hinge-jointed weapon-holding hand pairs.
*Each of the wings feature 4 points of articulation, allowing it to be rearranged.
*Gundam Bael can mount onto any [[Action Base]]s 1 or 4 (Sold separately, or onto the included ''AB'' from the first run)

==Tips and Tricks==
* For better results, some or most of the details are needed to be applied with Gundam Markers or Mr. Color paints.
* Topcoat (Mr. Hobby recommended) can be used to protect applied stickers and if any, marking decals and painted details.

==Variants==
:{{CurrentReissues}}
*First runs of the kit comes with a Pearl White [[Action Base]] 1 with a sheet of Gjallarhorn Insignia marking decals to apply onto.

==Notes & Trivia==
*Unlike the [[HGI-BO ASW-G-01 Gundam Bael|High Grade IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS kit]], the symbol on the left shoulder armor is color-coded.
